name: Pingvin Share
compose:
name: slashnode-pingvin-share
services:
  web:
    image: stonith404/pingvin-share:v1.13.0
    container_name: pingvin-share
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    volumes:
      - web_data-backend:/opt/app/backend/data
      - web_data-images:/opt/app/frontend/public/img
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:6453:3000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-backend:
    name: slashnode-pingvin-share_web_data-backend
  web_data-images:
    name: slashnode-pingvin-share_web_data-images
